A

ALLOW_REQUIRE - Static variable in class javalibs.Logic
 
appendRecord(String, List<String>, String[]) - Static method in class javalibs.CSVExtractor
Deprecated.
Use CSVUtils.appendRecord(java.lang.String, java.util.List<java.lang.String>, java.lang.String[])
appendRecord(String, List<String>, String[]) - Static method in class javalibs.CSVUtils
Append a row to a CSV file, creating it if it doesn't exist.
appendToFile(String, String) - Method in class javalibs.FileUtils
Append data to an existing file
arrayLimits(int, int) - Method in class javalibs.In
 
autoLog() - Method in class javalibs.TSL
See full description above: autoLog call without log message
autoLog(String) - Method in class javalibs.TSL
This function will automatically log an INFO message for the calling class name, function name, and line number of the function call.

B

BAD_NETWORK_ATTEMPT - Static variable in class javalibs.NetworkUtils
 
batteryCycleCount() - Method in class javalibs.SysHelper
Try to determine the current cycle count on the battery, if available
batteryTimeRemainingSeconds() - Method in class javalibs.SysHelper
Returns an estimated runtime on battery as reported by the OS where available.
between(int, int, int) - Static method in class javalibs.Validation
 

C

changeModTime(String, String) - Method in class javalibs.FileUtils
Change the modification time of a file
checkAndCreateDir(String) - Method in class javalibs.FileUtils
Create a directory if it doesn't exist
closeResultSet(ResultSet) - Method in class javalibs.DBQuery
Close a ResultSet, handling the checked exception.
closeResultSet(ResultSet) - Method in class javalibs.DBUtils
Deprecated.
Use DBQuery.closeResultSet(java.sql.ResultSet)
connect(String, String, String, boolean) - Method in class javalibs.DBConnection
Open a connection to the database.
connect(String, String, String, boolean) - Method in class javalibs.DBUtils
Deprecated.
Use DBConnection.connect(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, java.lang.String, boolean)
cpuMaxBaseFreq() - Method in class javalibs.SysHelper
Try to determine the max frequency of the CPU
cpuTemp() - Method in class javalibs.SysHelper
Attempt to get the current CPU temperature in Celsius
CSVDataNormalizer - Class in javalibs
 
CSVDataNormalizer(String, String, List<String>) - Constructor for class javalibs.CSVDataNormalizer
 
CSVDataNormalizer(String, String, Map<String, List<String>>) - Constructor for class javalibs.CSVDataNormalizer
 
CSVDataNormalizer(String, List<String>) - Constructor for class javalibs.CSVDataNormalizer
 
CSVDataNormalizer(String, Map<String, List<String>>) - Constructor for class javalibs.CSVDataNormalizer
We have a CSV file that has budget and revenue data for movies.
CSVExtractor - Class in javalibs
 
CSVExtractor(String) - Constructor for class javalibs.CSVExtractor
C'tor used to read in a CSV, get records, get headers, etc...
CSVExtractor(String, String, List<String>) - Constructor for class javalibs.CSVExtractor
C'tor used when extracting specific columns from a csv file and writing them to a new CSV file
CSVUtils - Class in javalibs
Stateless CSV utility methods.

D

DBConnection - Class in javalibs
Manages database connections.
DBQuery - Class in javalibs
Handles database query (SELECT) operations.
DBUpdate - Class in javalibs
Handles database write operations: INSERT, DELETE, UPDATE, and batch variants.
DBUtils - Class in javalibs
Deprecated.
This class is being phased out. Use the focused replacements instead:
  • DBConnection — connect / disconnect
  • DBQuery — select / selectAll / closeResultSet
  • DBUpdate — insert / delete / execute / insertAll / deleteAll
All methods here delegate to those classes. Existing callers continue to work without changes — migrate at your own pace.
debug(Object) - Method in class javalibs.TSL
javalibs.Log debug
debug(String) - Method in class javalibs.MTOut
 
delete(String, String, String, String, boolean) - Method in class javalibs.DBUpdate
Execute a single DELETE statement, managing the connection internally.
delete(String, String, String, String, boolean) - Method in class javalibs.DBUtils
Deprecated.
Use DBUpdate.delete(String, String, String, String, boolean)
delete(Connection, String) - Method in class javalibs.DBUpdate
Execute a single DELETE statement.
delete(Connection, String) - Method in class javalibs.DBUtils
Deprecated.
Use DBUpdate.delete(Connection, String)
deleteAll(String, String, String, List<String>, boolean) - Method in class javalibs.DBUpdate
Execute a batch DELETE, managing the connection internally.
deleteAll(String, String, String, List<String>, boolean) - Method in class javalibs.DBUtils
Deprecated.
Use DBUpdate.deleteAll(String, String, String, List, boolean)
deleteAll(Connection, List<String>) - Method in class javalibs.DBUpdate
Execute a batch DELETE.
deleteAll(Connection, List<String>) - Method in class javalibs.DBUtils
Deprecated.
Use DBUpdate.deleteAll(Connection, List)
deleteDir(String) - Method in class javalibs.FileUtils
 
deleteFile(String) - Method in class javalibs.FileUtils
Delete a file if it exists.
deserialize(Class<T>, String) - Static method in class javalibs.SerializationHelper
This is a generic deserialization method, it only needs to know the type of object it is deserializing.
die() - Method in class javalibs.TSL
Shutdown the logger, sleep for a second to allow the logger to finish flushing to disk then kill the program with exit code NOTE: This traps the calling thread!
die(Exception) - Method in class javalibs.TSL
 
die(Exception, String) - Method in class javalibs.TSL
 
die(String) - Method in class javalibs.TSL
Shutdown the logger, adding a final log message onto the queue before killing the program
dieFrom(Object) - Method in class javalibs.Logic
Kills the program while reporting the location from where the program was killed
DirWatcher - Class in javalibs
 
DirWatcher() - Constructor for class javalibs.DirWatcher
 
disconnect(Connection) - Method in class javalibs.DBConnection
Close a database connection.
disconnect(Connection) - Method in class javalibs.DBUtils
Deprecated.
Use DBConnection.disconnect(java.sql.Connection)
dolius(Object) - Method in class javalibs.TSL
More horrible additons
Double(String) - Static method in class javalibs.Validation
 

E

elevated() - Method in class javalibs.SysHelper

err(Object) - Method in class javalibs.TSL
javalibs.Log errors
err(String) - Method in class javalibs.MTOut
 
errFrom(String) - Method in class javalibs.TSL
See above for full description, substitute INFO for ERR
exception(Exception) - Method in class javalibs.TSL
Log an exception
exceptionFromAndDie(Exception) - Method in class javalibs.TSL
 
execute() - Method in interface javalibs.Functor
 
execute(Connection, String) - Method in class javalibs.DBUpdate
Execute a generic DB statement not related to insert, delete, or update.
execute(Connection, String) - Method in class javalibs.DBUtils
Deprecated.
Use DBUpdate.execute(java.sql.Connection, java.lang.String)
externalIPAddr() - Method in class javalibs.NetworkUtils
Get the external IP address when available

F

fexists(String) - Method in class javalibs.FileUtils

FileHasher - Class in javalibs
 
FileUtils - Class in javalibs
 
freeMemory() - Method in class javalibs.SysHelper
Returns the total free memeory *now* as reported by the Runtime Will return in GB / MB / KB or bytes based on the most appropriate unit

get() - Static method in class javalibs.FileUtils

get() - Static method in class javalibs.Logic

get() - Static method in class javalibs.NetworkUtils

get() - Static method in class javalibs.SysHelper
 
get() - Static method in class javalibs.TSL
Get reference to the logger
getAllFileObjectsInDir(String) - Method in class javalibs.FileUtils
Returns java File objects for all Files in a directory
getAllFilePathsInDir(String) - Method in class javalibs.FileUtils
Returns a list of absolute file paths to files in a directory
getAllFilePathsInDirWithPrefix(String, String) - Method in class javalibs.FileUtils
Returns a list of absolute file paths to files in a directory that start with the supplied prefix
getAllInputHeadersInOrder() - Method in class javalibs.CSVExtractor
Get the ordered headers from whatever CSV file has been read
getBufferedReaderForBZ2File(String) - Method in class javalibs.FileUtils
Get a BufferedReader capable of reading a BZ2 compressed file line by line
getBufferedReaderForGZIPFile(String) - Method in class javalibs.FileUtils
Get a BufferedReader capable of reading a GZIP compressed file line by line
getBufferedReaderForZipFile(String) - Method in class javalibs.FileUtils
 
getCSVRecords(String) - Static method in class javalibs.CSVExtractor
Deprecated.
Use CSVUtils.getCSVRecords(java.lang.String)
getCSVRecords(String) - Static method in class javalibs.CSVUtils
Read a CSV file and return all records.
getDoubleFromStr(String) - Static method in class javalibs.NumUtils
Parse a double from a string
getLongFromStr(String) - Static method in class javalibs.NumUtils
Parse a long from a string
getRecords() - Method in class javalibs.CSVExtractor
Get the records from whatever CSV file has been read
getStackInfo(Object) - Method in class javalibs.TSL
Builds the stack information string for autologging
getTotalPausedTimeNano() - Method in class javalibs.Timer
Get the total paused time in nanoseconds
getWorkingDir() - Method in class javalibs.FileUtils
Get the current working directory

Execute a single INSERT statement, managing the connection internally.

Deprecated.
Use DBUpdate.insert(String, String, String, String, boolean)

Execute a single INSERT, DELETE, or UPDATE statement.
insert(Connection, String) - Method in class javalibs.DBUtils
Deprecated.
Use DBUpdate.insert(Connection, String)
insertAll(String, String, String, List<String>, boolean) - Method in class javalibs.DBUpdate
Execute a batch INSERT, managing the connection internally.
insertAll(String, String, String, List<String>, boolean) - Method in class javalibs.DBUtils
Deprecated.
Use DBUpdate.insertAll(String, String, String, List, boolean)
insertAll(Connection, List<String>) - Method in class javalibs.DBUpdate
Execute a batch INSERT.
insertAll(Connection, List<String>) - Method in class javalibs.DBUtils
Deprecated.
Use DBUpdate.insertAll(Connection, List)

javalibs - package javalibs
 
javaVer() - Method in class javalibs.SysHelper
Get the version of the running JVM
JVMVendor() - Method in class javalibs.SysHelper

K

killLogWatcher() - Method in class javalibs.DirWatcher
Allow the user to stop the hashing without killing the instance Can be restarted by calling watchAndLogHash or watchAndPrintHash
killPrintWatcher() - Method in class javalibs.DirWatcher

Logic - Class in javalibs
 

M

maxMem() - Method in class javalibs.SysHelper
Returns the max available memory as reported by the Runtime Will return in GB / MB / KB or bytes based on the most appropriate unit
microseconds() - Method in class javalibs.Timer
Get the total execution time in microseconds, excluding the paused time
milliseconds() - Method in class javalibs.Timer
Get the total execution time in milliseconds, excluding the paused time
MTOut - Class in javalibs
Simple class that allows multiple threads to call the same print / log functions, however the print or log functions will only be called a single time, cleaning up the output and allowing everything to be more readable NOTE: This class will use TSL for logging calls NOTE (MORE IMPORTANT): This is a bullshit way to handle this but I don't have the time to figure out the 'right' way to do this.

N

nanoseconds() - Method in class javalibs.Timer
Get the total execution time in nanoseconds, excluding the paused time
NetworkUtils - Class in javalibs
 
normalize() - Method in class javalibs.CSVDataNormalizer
 
normalizeBetweenZeroOne(double, double, double) - Static method in class javalibs.NumUtils
Normalize a value to the range [0, 1]
NumUtils - Class in javalibs
 
NumUtils() - Constructor for class javalibs.NumUtils
 

O

osBuildNumber() - Method in class javalibs.SysHelper
Gets the OS build number where available
osCodeName() - Method in class javalibs.SysHelper
Gets the OS code name where available
osManufacturer() - Method in class javalibs.SysHelper
Gets OS manufacturer depending on available information
osName() - Method in class javalibs.SysHelper
Get the operating system name
osVer() - Method in class javalibs.SysHelper
Gets the OS version where available
osVersionFullInfo() - Method in class javalibs.SysHelper
Get the specific build information for the OS.

P

Pair<L,R> - Class in javalibs
Copyright (javalibs.c) 2018 Sean Grimes.
Pair(L, R) - Constructor for class javalibs.Pair
 
pauseTimer() - Method in class javalibs.Timer
Pause a timer, time while paused will not count against total execution time
physicalCPUCoreCount() - Method in class javalibs.SysHelper
Attempts to determine the number of physical processor cores
pingHost(String, int, int) - Method in class javalibs.NetworkUtils
Attempts to ping a host on a specific port with a specific timeout
pingWebHost(String) - Method in class javalibs.NetworkUtils
Attempts to ping a web server on port 80 with a timeout of 1000ms
prettyUptime() - Method in class javalibs.SysHelper
Get a good looking representation of the total system uptime
printHash(String) - Method in class javalibs.FileHasher
 

R

randomBoundedExclusiveDouble(double, double) - Static method in class javalibs.NumUtils
 
randomBoundedInclusiveInt(int, int) - Static method in class javalibs.NumUtils
 
randomizedList0ToExclusiveNWithoutRepeats(int) - Static method in class javalibs.NumUtils
 
readDouble() - Method in class javalibs.In
 
readDouble(String) - Method in class javalibs.In
 
readFullFile(String) - Method in class javalibs.FileUtils
Read a file in as a string
readInt() - Method in class javalibs.In
 
readInt(String) - Method in class javalibs.In
 
readLineByLine(String) - Method in class javalibs.FileUtils
Read a file line by line
readStr() - Method in class javalibs.In
 
readStr(String) - Method in class javalibs.In
 
reportedCPUCoreCount() - Method in class javalibs.SysHelper
Attemps to return the total number of logical CPUs available.
reportError(String) - Method in class javalibs.NetworkUtils
Send an error message to a host + port to be logged by that host
require(boolean) - Method in class javalibs.Logic
Similar to assertTrue, will kill the program if trueToLive is false, however it kills it from the logger, automatically giving you function, line information.
require(boolean, Object) - Method in class javalibs.Logic
Similar to assertTrue, will kill the program if trueToLive is false, however it kills it from the logger, automatically giving you function, line information.
results(Object) - Method in class javalibs.TSL
This is a horrible addition but I need to get results into a separate file
results(String) - Method in class javalibs.MTOut
 
resumeTimer() - Method in class javalibs.Timer
Resume a timer after pausing the timer
REWRITE_LOG_FILE - Static variable in class javalibs.TSL
 
REWRITE_RESULTS - Static variable in class javalibs.TSL
 
right() - Method in class javalibs.Pair
 
rootFreeSpace() - Method in class javalibs.SysHelper
Attempts to get the total free space available on the root partition NOTE: This is *NOT* robust and I only guarantee it to work on my machine
rootTotalSpace() - Method in class javalibs.SysHelper
Attempts to get the size of the root partition NOTE: This is *NOT* robust and I only guarantee it to work on my machine
run() - Method in class javalibs.TSL
 
runningOnAC() - Method in class javalibs.SysHelper
Returns true if verified AC power, else false.

S

seconds() - Method in class javalibs.Timer
Get the total execution time in seconds, excluding the paused time
select(Connection, String) - Method in class javalibs.DBQuery
Execute a SELECT statement and return the ResultSet.
select(Connection, String) - Method in class javalibs.DBUtils
Deprecated.
Use DBQuery.select(java.sql.Connection, java.lang.String)
selectAll(Connection, List<String>) - Method in class javalibs.DBQuery
Execute multiple SELECT statements and return all ResultSets.
selectAll(Connection, List<String>) - Method in class javalibs.DBUtils
Deprecated.
Use DBQuery.selectAll(java.sql.Connection, java.util.List<java.lang.String>)
sep() - Method in class javalibs.FileUtils
Get the file separator for the OS this system is running on
SerializationHelper - Class in javalibs
 
SerializationHelper() - Constructor for class javalibs.SerializationHelper
 
serialize(Class<T>, Object, String, String) - Static method in class javalibs.SerializationHelper
Serialize a class to disk using generics and passed class attributes.
shutDown() - Method in class javalibs.TSL
Shutdown the logger, thread will sleep for 1000ms to allow proper flushing NOTE: This does not kill the program, it just shutsdown the logger
splitOnChar(String, char) - Method in class javalibs.FileUtils
Split a string on a character
startTimer() - Method in class javalibs.Timer
Start the timer
stopTimer() - Method in class javalibs.Timer
Stop the timer
swarm(Object) - Method in class javalibs.TSL
Another horrible addition but I need swarm separate from results for identifying
swarm(String) - Method in class javalibs.MTOut
 
SysHelper - Class in javalibs
Copyright 2019 Sean Grimes.

W

warn(Object) - Method in class javalibs.TSL
javalibs.Log warnings
warn(String) - Method in class javalibs.MTOut
 
watchAndLogHash(String) - Method in class javalibs.DirWatcher
 
watchAndLogHash(String, String) - Method in class javalibs.DirWatcher
Watches the directory specified at instantiation Will hash any new or modified files Log format: filename: hash string Will not delete old hashes for modified files (yet...)
watchAndPrintHash(String) - Method in class javalibs.DirWatcher
Watches the directory specified at instantiation Will hash any new or modified files Print format: filename: hash string Will not delete old hashes for modified files (yet...)
write(Object) - Method in class javalibs.Out
 
write(String) - Method in class javalibs.MTOut
 
write_err(Object) - Method in class javalibs.Out
 
writeCSV() - Method in class javalibs.CSVExtractor
Writes the CSV to the path specified in the c'tor.
writeCSVRecord(String, CSVRecord, String[]) - Static method in class javalibs.CSVExtractor
Deprecated.
Use CSVUtils.writeCSVRecord(java.lang.String, org.apache.commons.csv.CSVRecord, java.lang.String[])
writeCSVRecord(String, CSVRecord, String[]) - Static method in class javalibs.CSVUtils
Write a single CSV record to a file.
writef(String, Object...) - Method in class javalibs.Out
 
writeln(Object) - Method in class javalibs.Out
 
writeln(String) - Method in class javalibs.MTOut
 
writeln_err(Object) - Method in class javalibs.Out
 
writeNewFile(String, String) - Method in class javalibs.FileUtils
Write a new file to disk.
writeWithoutResponse(String, int, String) - Method in class javalibs.NetworkUtils
Write a message to some host without any expected response from the host
